title: REAL rounding seems to depend on FROM clause
poc:
end on the FROM clause either. It is not certain that this can be reproduced on all machines.
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (t1.c1 = CAST(8366271098608253588 AS REAL));
SELECT * FROM t0, t1 WHERE (t1.c1 = CAST(8366271098608253588 AS REAL));
SELECT * FROM t0, t1 WHERE (t1.c1 >= CAST(8366271098608253588 AS REAL) AND t1.c1 <= CAST(8366271098608253588 AS REAL));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a = CAST(836627109860825358 AS REAL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a = CAST(836627109860825358 AS REAL);
key_bug_features: Floating-point rounding depends on the FROM clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = CAST(8366271098608253588 AS REAL);
CREATE TABLE another_table (name TEXT, ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
